techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection
techniques.description: Adversaries craft inputs to manipulate LLM behaviour, bypass safety measures, or extract information by injecting instructions into prompts.

techniques.name: LLM Jailbreak
techniques.description: Adversaries use specialised prompting techniques to bypass safety guardrails and cause the model to produce restricted or harmful outputs.

techniques.name: ML Model Inference API Access
techniques.description: Adversaries interact with a victim's ML model through an exposed inference API to extract information or probe model behaviour.

techniques.name: Data from Information Repositories
techniques.description: Adversaries extract sensitive data from information repositories accessible to the LLM, including vector stores and retrieval pipelines.

techniques.name: ML Artifact Collection
techniques.description: Adversaries collect ML artefacts such as model weights, embeddings, or training data to enable downstream attacks.

techniques.name: Backdoor ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries insert backdoors into ML models during training or fine-tuning that trigger specific behaviours on crafted inputs.

techniques.name: Poison Training Data
techniques.description: Adversaries introduce malicious examples into training datasets to manipulate model behaviour after deployment.

techniques.name: Craft Adversarial Data
techniques.description: Adversaries craft inputs specifically designed to cause misclassification, policy bypass, or unintended model behaviour.

techniques.name: ML-Enabled Product Abuse
techniques.description: Adversaries abuse ML-enabled product features to cause unintended real-world actions, resource exhaustion, or reputational harm.

techniques.name: Full ML Model Access
techniques.description: Adversaries gain full access to a target ML model, enabling extraction of weights, training data, or embedded sensitive information.
